resources.string: The app you open first at the ballpark.
This login screen already has the structure needed for a real auth flow. Firebase Auth providers can be connected next without rewriting the screen layer.
This button currently uses a fake auth repository to update session state. It can be replaced later with Google, Apple, anonymous, or other real providers.
Sprint 1 app structure is connected. Real data and authentication can be layered in next.
You reached Home with an active session state.
